notableEvents.label: Jared Triolo reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jared Triolo reaches on a throwing error by third baseman J.P. Crawford.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Horwitz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Horwitz grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop Colt Emerson to first baseman Josh Naylor. Jared Triolo out at 2nd. Spencer Horwitz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Esmerlyn Valdez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Esmerlyn Valdez singles on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Jake Mangum scores.

notableEvents.label: Esmerlyn Valdez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Esmerlyn Valdez doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Luke Raley.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jared Triolo reaches on a throwing error by third baseman J.P. Crawford.
